arts.ttl: Benfica Head Motivates David Neres Sale to Napoli
arts.sum: Former Milan and Fiorentina legend and current Benfica president Rui Costa has revisited the sale of Davide Neres to Napoli. The Partenopei paid €28M for the speedster, who cracked Serie A’s record books thanks to three consecutive assists. The post Benfica Head Motivates David Neres Sale to Napoli appeared first on The Cult of Calcio.

arts.ttl: Chelsea 'plot £130m double Bundesliga raid' as Victor Osimhen alternative emerges
arts.sum: Chelsea reportedly add RB Leipzig defender Castello Lukeba and Bayer Leverkusen striker Victor Boniface to their list of 2025 transfer targets.

Victor Osimhen ’s agent has claimed that “someone made a mistake” in the summer such that the Nigeria international wound up at Galatasaray on loan from Napoli and not at Chelsea or PSG . Osimhen was linked with a big-money move from the Serie A club to Chelsea or PSG, yet he finds himself in Turkey until at least January and potentially until the end of the season.
